endpoints.name: GET /v1/.well-known/openid-configuration
endpoints.description: Fetch configuration details about the OpenID Connect Authorization Server
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/certs
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/device/code
endpoints.description: Issues a new Access token (optionally identity_token & refresh_token) in exchange of Oauth grant
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/token
endpoints.description: Issues a new Access token (optionally identity_token & refresh_token) in exchange of Oauth grant
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/userinfo
endpoints.description: Retrieves the consented UserInfo and other claims about the logged-in subject (end-user).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.
